[258:04]Now that we're clearly ascended, I do actually think now we have some responsibility,

[258:09]and especially as Catholics, we have, as Christians,

[258:12]we have a moral responsibility not to lean into cruelty.

[258:16]It's important to avoid excess.

[258:19]And the message on the show, I want to hold the line on this very clearly.

[258:24]My message on the show from the very beginning was never

[258:28]that we hate everybody that isn't white or that we hate everybody that isn't right-wing or Christian or something like that.

[258:37]That's never the point of the show.

[258:39]The point of the show is, I, as an 18-year-old young man, one day realized the country was irreversibly being altered by this deliberate social...

[258:51]engineering program called mass migration where they were replacing what should have been my kids and grandkids with immigrants from dysfunctional low IQ countries.

[259:01]As a result, the country is becoming unrecognizable. The country is becoming alien, which is in itself a violation of our love of our home and our right to a homeland.

[259:13]But also, it's becoming worse. It's becoming impoverished. It's becoming more poor. The

[259:18]native people who have an ancestral claim to the land are being squeezed by these foreigners,

[259:24]by these foreigners who objectively are creating inferior conditions. We should stop that.

[259:30]It is, it is right. It is just.

[259:33]It is responsible for ourselves, for our posterity and for our ancestors to stop this madness.

[259:39]We understand why the people are coming here.

[259:41]They're coming here because they're in dire straits.

[259:44]And for those people that are looking out for their families

[259:47]in Central America or Africa or wherever,

[259:50]it only makes sense if they can take a shot

[259:53]and try and land in the United States

[259:55]where we have free everything

[259:57]and we have clean roads and infrastructure

[260:00]and public services, why not take a shot?

[260:03]You don't necessarily blame them at the same time.

[260:06]It cannot be tolerated.

[260:07]We don't hate them.

[260:09]And on some level, we want to help them.

[260:12]We want to help them where they are.

[260:14]White people have given the world great inventions and progress and social progress and a legal system.

[260:21]And we've given the world a lot of great things.

[260:24]The way to truly help these other people

[260:27]is not to destroy the foundations

[260:29]of what we've given the world,

[260:30]which is our race, which is our civilization.

[260:34]The fruits and the invention flows from,

[260:38]proceeds from our genetics.

[260:41]It proceeds from our genetics, our society, our culture.

[260:44]Those are the foundations which must be preserved.

[260:48]For the other races to take advantage,

[260:51]for the other races to benefit,

[261:07]off.

[261:08]There are other ways to do it, but this is not it.

[261:11]And so I want to make that very clear.

[261:13]We love them.

[261:15]We understand why they're doing it.

[261:18]We have to repel the invasion first and foremost.

[261:24]If that's at all possible, where they are.

[261:31]and resentment, and to give back the same hatred

[261:36]I love my own people.
